title: OpenAI Retires GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini from ChatGPT
summary: OpenAI will retire GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini from ChatGPT on February 13, 2026. No API changes are announced at this time.
why_included: This is a high-impact deprecation announcement from OpenAI, as multiple popular models are being removed from ChatGPT with a concrete end-of-life date.
